---------

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>
Co-authored-by: dependabot[bot] <49699333+dependabot[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: olebaba <42940656+olebaba@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: instant cached login with background authentication (#108)

* feat: instant cached login with background authentication

On repeat logins, hash the entered password with SHA-256 and compare
against a stored hash. If it matches, show the Dashboard with IndexedDB
cached data immediately while SSE authentication continues in the
background. Progress (e.g. "Authenticating browser…") is shown in the
top-bar SyncStatus area. When auth completes, the session is saved and
a full data refresh fires automatically.

On auth failure the top bar shows an error with a "Sign in again" link
(falls back to full login flow). The credential hash (never the plain
password) is saved after every successful login to enable the fast-path
on all subsequent visits.

- session.ts: add hashPassword(), saveCredentials(), loadCredentials()
- types.ts: add 'background-auth' AuthState variant
- App.tsx: wire background-auth handlers; render Dashboard for both
  'authenticated' and 'background-auth' states with token: string | null
- AuthFlow.tsx: fast-path on hash match; save credentials on success
- Dashboard.tsx: skip network fetch when token is null; trigger
  refreshAll() when token transitions null→string
- SyncStatus.tsx: show spinner + progress message / error during
  background auth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update dashboard/src/components/AuthFlow.tsx

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address PR review feedback on instant login

- session.ts: upgrade hashPassword from SHA-256 to PBKDF2-SHA-256
  (100k iterations, fixed app salt) to slow offline brute-force;
  add loadCredentials shape validation and 30-day expiry; saveCredentials
  now persists createdAt timestamp
- App.tsx: fix race condition in handleBackgroundAuthComplete — use
  functional setAuthState to guard against stale completions after
  logout; call clearCredentials() on logout; drop errorMessage field
  from backgroundAuth prop (unused)
- AuthFlow.tsx: wrap hashPassword in try/catch so WebCrypto failure
  falls back to foreground auth instead of crashing
- Dashboard.tsx: guard intersection observer and handleMemberSelect
  against triggering lazy loaders when token is null (background-auth)
- SyncStatus.tsx: remove unused errorMessage from backgroundAuth prop
- AuthFlow.test.tsx: add 5 tests covering background-auth fast-path
  (hash match → onStartBackgroundAuth, progress routing, error routing,
  hash mismatch falls back to foreground, credentials saved on success)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: don't clear credentials on logout

Clearing the credential hash on logout defeats the fast-path feature —
the hash must survive logouts so the next login can skip the wait.
The 30-day expiry in loadCredentials() is sufficient for cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: allow empty contactId in loadCredentials validation

The backend SSE complete event does not include contactId, so it is
saved as '' and fetched dynamically via client.initialize(). The
validation added during code review rejected '' as malformed and
silently deleted the stored record on first read, preventing the
fast-path from ever triggering.

Also removes temporary debug logging added during diagnosis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: stale-while-revalidate for data refresh

Previously all panels cleared to skeleton placeholders during a refresh,
causing ~8s of blank content while data reloaded.

- refreshAll: preserve existing data when resetting lazy sections —
  sections with data transition to 'loading' (content still rendered)
  rather than 'idle' (skeleton). Sections scroll into view as before.
- SummaryTiles / ComplianceTable: only show skeleton on initial load
  (no data yet), not on subsequent refreshes where stale data exists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: reorder dashboard sections and collapse low-priority panels

New order: Joining Journey → Disclosure Compliance → Suspensions →
Learning Records → Team Directory (collapsed) → Permits (collapsed) →
Awards & Recognitions (collapsed)

Team Directory, Permits, and Awards are collapsed by default with a
chevron toggle. Collapsing prevents lazy loading from triggering for
those sections until explicitly opened. Expanding fires the load
immediately if the section hasn't been fetched yet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add Expiring Soon / Not Started quick-filter to Learning Records table

Filter is enabled by default to highlight records needing attention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address Copilot review feedback on instant-cached-login

- Guard lazy section load/retry callbacks (teamReviews, permits, awards)
  against null token during background-auth to prevent unauthorized requests
- Add keyboard accessibility to LazySection h2 toggle (role, tabIndex, onKeyDown)
- Validate `createdAt` as a finite number in loadCredentials() to prevent
  NaN comparison bypassing CREDENTIALS_MAX_AGE_MS expiry
- Restore global.fetch in afterEach in AuthFlow background-auth tests
  to prevent leaking mock into subsequent test files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: correct fetchMock.mock.calls type cast in traces-proxy test

vi.fn() without type params infers mock.calls as [], causing tsc to
reject destructuring. Cast through unknown to Parameters<typeof fetch>.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(redesign): premium visual overhaul, number reconciliation, performance fix

Visual:
- Hero carousel: SVG chevron arrows (w-12 h-12), gradient CTA buttons
- Typography: eliminated all sub-10px text, minimum now text-xs (12px)
- Sub-pages: unique color-identity hero banners (cyan/mercado, green/tech, purple/pesquisa, red/seguranca)
- Panorama: larger KPIs, larger section headers, premium glass styling

Numbers reconciled:
- Countries: 972→37 (filter ≥20 jobs, exclude garbage)
- Insights: 104→46 (only publishable)
- Sources: 85→36 (real count)
- Removed fake 'Capital Rastreado US$ 1.4T' KPI (funding data is mis-sourced)
- Replaced with 'Tech Trends' KPI using real tech_trends data (38K signals)
- Fixed '~85% EUA' to '~54% EUA'
- Patents filtered: 37K mock-generated excluded

Methodology page:
- Replaced fake source list (CrunchBase, PitchBook, LinkedIn API) with real connected sources
- Added REAL/MOCK badges per KPI (10 real, 10 mock)
- Added honesty disclaimer about unconnected sources

Performance:
- Created materialized view mv_papers_vs_jobs (85s query→<100ms)
- Charts API now returns in <1s instead of timing out

Panorama charts:
- Replaced empty 'Investimento por Tipo' panel with 'Geopolítica ACLED' (929K events)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(ci): use RELEASE_PLEASE_TOKEN to bypass branch protection

Branch protection prevents release-please from creating its
release branch with the default GITHUB_TOKEN. Use a PAT stored
in secrets.RELEASE_PLEASE_TOKEN instead.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: initial Android app with Compose UI, CI pipeline, and Copilot c… (#1)

* feat: initial Android app with Compose UI, CI pipeline, and Copilot config

- Compose UI with 5 tracking service toggle cards (Bluetooth, WiFi, GPS, Mobile Data, Carrier Signal)
- Auto turn-off settings with configurable timer for BT/WiFi/GPS/Mobile Data
- Real-time service state monitoring via system broadcasts and callbackFlow
- Clean Architecture: Model → Data (ServiceController) → UI (ViewModel + Compose)
- Hilt DI, Material 3 theming, accessibility semantics
- GitHub Actions CI: build, test, lint on PR
- Copilot instructions, Android senior agent, and 8 agent skills

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add Gradle wrapper (gradlew, gradlew.bat, gradle-wrapper.jar)

CI pipeline requires the wrapper to build. Adds the standard Gradle 8.10.2
wrapper scripts and jar.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: set execute permission on gradlew

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add launcher icon resources

Adds generated PNG launcher icons for all densities and adaptive icon
XML for API 26+. Fixes processDebugResources AAPT error.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address all PR review comments

- Add Apache 2.0 license headers to all Kotlin source files
- Rename requestDisable/toggleService to openSettings/openServiceSettings
- Fix modifier parameter ordering in all Composables (modifier first)
- Move all hardcoded strings to strings.xml with stringResource()
- Switch manifest theme from legacy Material to custom Theme.AntiTracker
- Remove unused location permissions (ACCESS_FINE/COARSE_LOCATION)
- Fix expand button touch target from 32dp to 48dp minimum
- Fix non-local returns in ViewModel update{} lambdas (return@update)
- Restart auto-off countdown when timer value changes
- Wrap BluetoothAdapter.isEnabled in try/catch for SecurityException
- Fix mobile data detection: use TelephonyManager.isDataEnabled instead
  of checking active network transport (was wrong when WiFi is active)
- Add MainViewModelTest with 7 unit tests covering auto-off logic

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add MainDispatcherRule for ViewModel unit tests

viewModelScope uses Dispatchers.Main which is unavailable in JVM unit
tests. Added a TestWatcher rule that sets/resets Main dispatcher, and
added advanceUntilIdle() calls to ensure coroutines complete.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: make MainDispatcherRule non-private

The rule is exposed as a public property via @get:Rule, so it cannot
be private-in-file. Moved it above FakeServiceController.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove duplicate FakeServiceController class in test

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove premature advanceUntilIdle after timer-starting ops

advanceUntilIdle() after setTimer/setAutoTurnOff was completing the
entire delay immediately, causing the countdown to fire before the
test expected it. Now only advance time manually with advanceTimeBy().

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address second round of PR review comments

- Remove statusBarColor override from Theme.kt (conflicts with edge-to-edge)
- Replace hardcoded status text with stringResource() calls
- Fix stale comment 'toggle' → 'open settings' in ServiceCard
- Use formatted string resource for toast (%1\ placeholder)
- Add extraBufferCapacity=1 to SharedFlow, use tryEmit, call
  openSettings before event emission to avoid suspend blocking
- Fix GPS isInUse: set false instead of mirroring isEnabled
  (auto-off was impossible since isInUse always matched isEnabled)
- Add semantics(mergeDescendants=true) to auto-off Row for a11y

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: localize service labels and enforce timer minimum

- Replace hardcoded TrackingService.label with @StringRes labelRes
  for proper i18n support (resolves UI localization concern)
- Add service name string resources to strings.xml
- Update all usages: stringResource() in Compose, context.getString()
  for toast formatting
- Enforce minimum timer of 1 second in setTimer (coerceAtLeast(1))
  to prevent delay(0) triggering auto-off immediately
- Add timerSec <= 0 guard in evaluateAutoOff as belt-and-suspenders
- Add test for timer minimum enforcement

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: TOCTOU guard in auto-off and multi-profile BT detection

- Re-check uiState after delay in evaluateAutoOff to prevent
  triggering when service came back in use during countdown
- Extend Bluetooth 'in use' detection to GATT, GATT_SERVER,
  A2DP, and HEADSET profiles (was GATT-only, missing audio/headset)
- Catch IllegalArgumentException per profile for unsupported profiles
- Add test for TOCTOU guard scenario

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: use ConnectivityManager for mobile data, drop READ_PHONE_STATE

- Replace TelephonyManager.isDataEnabled (requires runtime permission
  that was never requested) with ConnectivityManager cellular transport
  check — works without dangerous permissions
- Remove READ_PHONE_STATE from manifest (no longer needed)
- Remove dead telephonyManager field and TelephonyManager import

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: conservative BT state, theme-aware colors, timer debounce, no backup

- BT: return isInUse=true on SecurityException (conservative default
  prevents incorrect auto-off when permission is denied)
- Theme: derive ServiceEnabled/ServiceDisabled from MaterialTheme
  colorScheme for dark mode support and WCAG contrast compliance
- Timer: commit value only on IME Done action instead of every
  keystroke, avoiding countdown job churn while typing
- Manifest: set allowBackup=false for privacy-focused app

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: conservative BT isEnabled default, add neverForLocation flag

- Return isEnabled=true on SecurityException to avoid showing
  Bluetooth as disabled when it may actually be on
- Add android:usesPermissionFlags=neverForLocation to
  BLUETOOTH_CONNECT since this app doesn't derive location from BT

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: lifecycle-aware event collection with repeatOnLifecycle

- Replace LaunchedEffect(Unit) with repeatOnLifecycle(STARTED)
  so event collection (toasts) pauses when app is backgrounded
- Matches lifecycle-aware approach used for uiState collection

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: rename AutoOffTriggered to AutoOffSettingsOpened

- Rename event to reflect actual behavior (opens settings, does not
  disable the service directly)
- Update toast copy: 'not in use - opening settings' instead of
  'auto-disabled' which was misleading
- Update all references in ViewModel, MainScreen, and tests

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: add Shizuku integration for direct service toggling

- Add Shizuku SDK dependency (api + provider, v13.1.5)
- Create ShizukuServiceToggler: wraps Shizuku lifecycle, permission,
  and shell commands (svc wifi/bluetooth, cmd location, svc data,
  airplane mode) for direct service enable/disable
- Add ShizukuProvider to AndroidManifest.xml
- Extend ServiceController interface with setEnabled(),
  canToggleDirectly(), observeToggleAvailability(), requestTogglePermission()
- ViewModel: toggleService() disables via Shizuku when available,
  falls back to openSettings; auto-off now actually disables services
  when Shizuku is ready
- UI: ShizukuStatusBanner shows Shizuku state (not available,
  permission needed with grant button, or ready)
- ServiceCard: tap icon toggles service directly or opens settings
- Add ServiceDisabled event + toast for actual auto-off disable
- Update tests: FakeServiceController implements new interface,
  add toggleService test with Shizuku mock

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: replace private Shizuku.newProcess with UserService AIDL approach

- Switch from Shizuku.newProcess (private in v13) to UserService pattern
  with ICommandService AIDL + CommandService implementation
- Add CommandService: Shizuku UserService that runs shell commands with
  elevated privileges, properly drains streams and destroys processes
- Inject CoroutineDispatcher via @IoDispatcher qualifier instead of
  hardcoding Dispatchers.IO (per project conventions)
- Remove INTERACT_ACROSS_USERS_FULL permission from ShizukuProvider
  (signature/system-only, blocks normal Shizuku binding)
- Enable AIDL build feature in build.gradle.kts
- Bind UserService when Shizuku becomes READY; unbind on binder death

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address 5 PR review issues (timeout, fallback, guard, focus, permission)

- CommandService: add 10s timeout with destroyForcibly() fallback
  to prevent hung shell commands from blocking the service thread
- MainViewModel.toggleService: handle setEnabled failure by falling
  back to openSettings (added test for this path)
- ShizukuServiceToggler: add isBound guard to prevent redundant
  bindUserService calls from multiple binder-received events
- ServiceCard timer: commit value on focus loss (onFocusChanged) in
  addition to IME Done, so navigating away preserves the edit
- MainScreen: request BLUETOOTH_CONNECT runtime permission at startup
  so BT state detection works instead of always hitting SecurityException

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address 5 PR review issues (context, auto-off fallback, cancellation, mobile data, readText)

- ShizukuServiceToggler: inject @ApplicationContext and use
  context.packageName instead of hardcoded PACKAGE_NAME constant
- ShizukuServiceToggler.setEnabled: rethrow CancellationException
  before the generic catch to preserve cooperative cancellation
- MainViewModel.evaluateAutoOff: check setEnabled return value and
  fall back to openSettings on failure (with AutoOffSettingsOpened event)
- SystemServiceController: use Settings.Global 'mobile_data' for
  isEnabled (accurate when on Wi-Fi), keep ConnectivityManager for
  isInUse; add ContentObserver to observe setting changes
- CommandService: remove blocking readText() before waitFor so the
  timeout is effective; our svc commands produce minimal output

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: pipe buffer, timer validation, auto-off re-fire prevention

- CommandService: use ProcessBuilder.Redirect.DISCARD to prevent pipe
  buffer blockage (available since API 33, our minSdk is 34)
- ServiceCard timer: filter input to digits-only, revert to last
  known-good value on focus loss if text is empty/non-numeric
- MainViewModel.evaluateAutoOff: change job check from isActive to
  null-check so completed jobs prevent re-triggering; auto-off only
  re-arms when service comes back in use then idle again
- Added test: auto-off does not re-fire until service returns to use

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: use /dev/null redirect instead of Redirect.DISCARD (not on Android)

Redirect.DISCARD is Java 9+ JDK only and not available in Android's
ProcessBuilder. Use Redirect.to(File('/dev/null')) instead, which is
available on all Android versions and achieves the same effect.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: canToggleDirectly race, DayNight theme support

- ShizukuServiceToggler: add isServiceConnected() check
- SystemServiceController.canToggleDirectly: require both READY state
  AND connected UserService, preventing false-positive toggles during
  the async binding window after permission grant
- Theme: switch to DayNight support with values-night/themes.xml
  (dark: Theme.Material.NoActionBar), remove deprecated translucent
  window flags (redundant with enableEdgeToEdge already in MainActivity)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: canToggle UI consistency, isBound retry on null service

- MainUiState: add canToggle field derived from canToggleDirectly()
  so UI accurately reflects service connection state, not just
  Shizuku READY. Updated in both Shizuku state and service observers.
- MainScreen/MainScreenContent: pass canToggle from uiState instead
  of comparing shizukuState == READY directly
- ShizukuServiceToggler.setEnabled: if commandService is null despite
  READY state, reset isBound and rebind (fixes stuck-after-failed-bind)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: use rememberSaveable for ServiceCard expansion state

Preserves card expansion state across configuration changes
(e.g. screen rotation) by using rememberSaveable instead of remember.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: canToggleDirectly race, DayNight theme support

- ShizukuServiceToggler: add isServiceConnected() check
- SystemServiceController.canToggleDirectly: require both READY state
  AND connected UserService, preventing false-positive toggles during
  the async binding window after permission grant
- Theme: switch to DayNight support with values-night/themes.xml
  (dark: Theme.Material.NoActionBar), remove deprecated translucent
  window flags (redundant with enableEdgeToEdge already in MainActivity)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: use /dev/null redirect instead of Redirect.DISCARD (not on Android)

Redirect.DISCARD is Java 9+ JDK only and not available in Android's
ProcessBuilder. Use Redirect.to(File('/dev/null')) instead, which is
available on all Android versions and achieves the same effect.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: pipe buffer, timer validation, auto-off re-fire prevention

- CommandService: use ProcessBuilder.Redirect.DISCARD to prevent pipe
  buffer blockage (available since API 33, our minSdk is 34)
- ServiceCard timer: filter input to digits-only, revert to last
  known-good value on focus loss if text is empty/non-numeric
- MainViewModel.evaluateAutoOff: change job check from isActive to
  null-check so completed jobs prevent re-triggering; auto-off only
  re-arms when service comes back in use then idle again
- Added test: auto-off does not re-fire until service returns to use

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: address 5 PR review issues (context, auto-off fallback, cancellation, mobile data, readText)

- ShizukuServiceToggler: inject @ApplicationContext and use
  context.packageName instead of hardcoded PACKAGE_NAME constant
- ShizukuServiceToggler.setEnabled: rethrow CancellationException
  before the generic catch to preserve cooperative cancellation
- MainViewModel.evaluateAutoOff: check setEnabled return value and
  fall back to openSettings on failure (with AutoOffSettingsOpened event)
- SystemServiceController: use Settings.Global 'mobile_data' for
  isEnabled (accurate when on Wi-Fi), keep ConnectivityManager for
  isInUse; add ContentObserver to observe setting changes
- CommandService: remove blocking readText() before waitFor so the
  timeout is effective; our svc commands produce minimal output

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: BYVoid <245270+BYVoid@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/BYVoid/OpenCC/sessions/fe063606-4785-4a11-ba16-6dcbdaaa7c80

* Drop Python 3.8 support: incompatible with setuptools>=78.1.1

setuptools 78.x requires Python >= 3.9, so building for Python 3.8
fails after the setuptools minimum was raised to 78.1.1. Remove 3.8
from the CI test matrix and all release scripts (Linux, macOS, Windows),
and update the twine upload environments from py3.8 to py3.9.

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: BYVoid <245270+BYVoid@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: address PR feedback

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: address 5 PR review issues (timeout, fallback, guard, focus, permission)

- CommandService: add 10s timeout with destroyForcibly() fallback
  to prevent hung shell commands from blocking the service thread
- MainViewModel.toggleService: handle setEnabled failure by falling
  back to openSettings (added test for this path)
- ShizukuServiceToggler: add isBound guard to prevent redundant
  bindUserService calls from multiple binder-received events
- ServiceCard timer: commit value on focus loss (onFocusChanged) in
  addition to IME Done, so navigating away preserves the edit
- MainScreen: request BLUETOOTH_CONNECT runtime permission at startup
  so BT state detection works instead of always hitting SecurityException

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: replace private Shizuku.newProcess with UserService AIDL approach

- Switch from Shizuku.newProcess (private in v13) to UserService pattern
  with ICommandService AIDL + CommandService implementation
- Add CommandService: Shizuku UserService that runs shell commands with
  elevated privileges, properly drains streams and destroys processes
- Inject CoroutineDispatcher via @IoDispatcher qualifier instead of
  hardcoding Dispatchers.IO (per project conventions)
- Remove INTERACT_ACROSS_USERS_FULL permission from ShizukuProvider
  (signature/system-only, blocks normal Shizuku binding)
- Enable AIDL build feature in build.gradle.kts
- Bind UserService when Shizuku becomes READY; unbind on binder death

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

copilot-instructions.md, with Azure DevOps section removed.

files to ~/.copilot/ and ~/.codex/ during default installs.

repository.description: Task flows let you describe your problem and have an AI agent generate your Microsoft Fabric solution—workspaces, pipelines, notebooks, data agents, models, reports, and more—delivered as a CI/CD‑ready script, ready to deploy.

commit.message:
Fix circuit-sim for Windows: text rawfile + encoding

- parse_rawfile.py: Support both binary and text (Values:) rawfile
  formats. Windows ngspice outputs text format even with -r flag.
- run_sim.py: Add encoding='utf-8' to all NamedTemporaryFile and
  Path.read_text() calls. Fixes UnicodeEncodeError on Windows
  where the default encoding is cp1252.

Tested: all three example netlists (rc_lowpass, pulse_response,
rc_sweep) pass end-to-end on Windows with ngspice 45.2.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add Windows/PowerShell cross-platform support

- Add install.ps1 for circuit-sim, elmer-fem, netlist-to-schematic
  (modeled after memory's existing install.ps1)
- Add top-level install.ps1 that iterates skills/*/install.ps1
- Add .gitattributes enforcing LF for .sh, CRLF for .ps1
- Update all READMEs with Windows PowerShell installation instructions
- Fix elmer-fem SKILL.md: replace sed/inline env var with cross-platform
- Fix memory SKILL.md: remove bash-specific mkdir -p and date syntax
- Fix AGENTS.md /tmp/ paths with relative paths (cross-platform)
- Add explicit encoding='utf-8' to run_sim.py Path.read_text()

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Rewrite README for a warmer first impression

- Lead with bold value prop instead of dry definition
- Add 'Who is this for?' section so readers self-identify
- Reframe skills table as benefits ('What it does for you')
- Move Quick Start below the pitch (why before how)
- Fold Item Registry and Templates into What's Inside table
- Consistent conversational tone throughout

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Deep scrub: dead code removal, doc fixes, skill efficiency, registry+signal updates

Wave 1 - Dead code & doc fixes:
- Remove orphaned $cli_version lines from sync-item-types.py
- Remove deprecated build_fab_commands() from registry_loader.py + tests
- Replace fragile importlib hack in fleet-runner.py with text_utils.slugify
- Fix stale counts in README (45 items, 838 tests), CONTRIBUTING, CHANGELOG
- Update fabric-test SKILL.md to 3-state validation (passed/partial/failed)

Wave 2 - Skill efficiency:
- Consolidate fabric-discover Steps 4/5 to eliminate duplicate user Q&A
- Add parallel-read instruction to fabric-document Step 1

Wave 3 - Registry & signal mapper:
- Add Scorecard item type to registry (45 total items)
- Patch signal-categories.json with 8 new keywords across 3 categories
- Add low-coverage advisory to signal-mapper.py output
- Align task type names in taskflow-gen.py, tests, and schema (ingest/store/etc)
- Fix test-plan-prefill.py availability check to match registry abbreviation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: skip Firebase preview deploy for Dependabot PRs (#110)

* fix: skip Firebase preview deploy for Dependabot PRs

Dependabot PRs cannot access repository secrets (GitHub restriction since
Feb 2023), so the FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_GLV_DASHBOARD secret resolves
to empty string and the deploy action errors with "Input required and not
supplied: firebaseServiceAccount". Adding the dependabot[bot] actor check
skips the job cleanly instead of failing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: bkk-honest-frontend
repository.description: A community platform for locals and tourists in Bangkok to share honest tips, real prices, and live city updates.

commit.message:
Clean typography: single sans-serif font, solid divider, allergies always shown

- Single font (system-ui sans-serif) throughout
- 3 sizes only: 0.75rem labels, 0.85rem message, 0.9rem values
- Weight used for hierarchy: 700 labels, 600 names, 400 values
- Solid vertical divider between left/star, inset from top/bottom
- Allergies field always visible (shows dash if empty)
- Dashed cut lines between cards, no outer border

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Polish stargram cards: dotted cut lines, cleaner typography, bigger star

- Dashed cut lines between cards (no outer border)
- Serif labels (Georgia) for a polished print feel
- Inline label: value layout with natural wrapping
- Allergies only shown when relevant (not 'no'/'none')
- Message in italic serif below To/From with subtle separator
- Vertically centered content in all columns
- Larger star (150px)
- Clean B&W print output, 4 per page

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove deprecated Datamart from item registry

Datamart has been deprecated by Microsoft. Removed from:
- item-type-registry.json (full item entry)
- script-config.json (taskflow node mapping)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Enrich aliases for all 45 registry items

Add ~90 new aliases across 42 items covering:
- Common abbreviations (lh, wh, dw, eh, nb, sjd, udf, env, pq, etc.)
- Industry terms (dataset, power query, data warehouse, rdl, etc.)
- Platform names (fabric lakehouse, spark notebook, kusto database, etc.)
- Alternate spellings (lake house, event stream, data mart, etc.)
